interaction_rules.handoff_protocol: Always include a structured handoff summary with: task_completed, key_findings, open_questions, suggested_next_steps. Data passes via file references, not inline content.
interaction_rules.conflict_resolution: Orchestrator decides. Log disagreement in memory/shared/DECISIONS_LOG.md.
interaction_rules.output_validation: All outputs must validate against the agent's OUTPUT_SCHEMA.json.

_agent_schema_reference._comment: Each agent in the agents array should have these fields. This object is a reference, not used at runtime.
_agent_schema_reference.id: string — unique agent identifier (lowercase, no spaces)
_agent_schema_reference.name: string — display name (e.g., IRIS)
receives_from: array of agent IDs that send work to this agent
hands_off_to: array of agent IDs this agent sends work to
tools: array of general tool names (web_search, file_read, file_write, etc.)
mcp_tools: array of MCP server keys from .mcp.json assigned to this agent

mcp_tool_notes.server-key: string — when and how this agent should use this MCP server
